hero.headline: Learn. Earn. Grow On-Chain.
hero.subheadline: The decentralized learning platform where every lesson you complete is recorded on-chain. Earn soulbound XP tokens, collect credential NFTs, and build a verifiable learning history.

features.sectionSubtitle: A new paradigm for verifiable, rewarding education on Solana.

onChainXp.title: On-Chain XP
onChainXp.description: Every lesson completion mints soulbound XP tokens directly to your wallet via Token-2022. Your progress is transparent and immutable.

credentialNfts.title: Credential NFTs
credentialNfts.description: Complete a course and receive a Metaplex Core credential NFT — a tamper-proof, wallet-visible certificate of completion.

achievements.title: Achievements
achievements.description: Unlock on-chain achievement badges as you reach milestones. Showcase your accomplishments to the Solana ecosystem.

openContent.title: Open Content
openContent.description: Course content is stored on Arweave for permanent, censorship-resistant access. Knowledge belongs to everyone.

leaderboards.title: Leaderboards
leaderboards.description: Compete with learners around the world. XP leaderboards are powered by Helius DAS API for real-time accuracy.

solanaNative.title: Solana Native
solanaNative.description: Built natively on Solana for sub-second finality and near-zero transaction fees. Learning has never been this affordable.

howItWorks.sectionSubtitle: Your path from learner to certified Solana builder.

step1.title: Connect Your Wallet
step1.description: Sign in with your Solana wallet. No email or password required.

step2.title: Enroll in a Course
step2.description: Browse the catalog and enroll in courses that match your goals.

step3.title: Complete Lessons
step3.description: Work through lessons at your own pace. Each completion is recorded on-chain and earns you XP.

step4.title: Earn Your Credential
step4.description: Finish all lessons to finalize the course and claim your soulbound credential NFT.

cta.headline: Ready to Build on Solana?
cta.subheadline: Join thousands of learners earning verifiable credentials on-chain.

catalog.title: Course Catalog
catalog.subtitle: Expand your Solana knowledge with expert-curated courses.
catalog.resultsCount: {count, plural, one {# course} other {# courses}} found

enrollment.enrollDescription: You are about to enroll in {courseName}. Your enrollment will be recorded on-chain.
enrollment.enrollError: Failed to enroll. Please try again.
enrollment.alreadyEnrolled: You are already enrolled in this course.
enrollment.unenrollDescription: Are you sure you want to unenroll from {courseName}? Your progress will be lost.
enrollment.unenrollCooldownNotice: You must wait {hours} hours before re-enrolling.

completion.title: Lesson Complete!
completion.courseCompleteSubtitle: You've completed all lessons. Finalize the course to claim your credential.
completion.alreadyCompleted: You have already completed this lesson.

overview.title: Dashboard
overview.subtitle: Track your learning journey and on-chain progress.

streaks.title: Learning Streak
streaks.streakAt risk: Log in tomorrow to keep your streak!
streaks.streakBonusDescription: Complete a lesson today for a {multiplier}x XP bonus.

activeCourses.title: Active Courses
activeCourses.emptySubtitle: Browse the catalog to start learning.

achievements.title: Achievements
achievements.emptySubtitle: Complete courses and milestones to earn achievements.

credentials.title: Credentials
credentials.emptySubtitle: Complete a course to earn your first credential NFT.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Top learners ranked by on-chain XP.
leaderboard.empty: No learners on the leaderboard yet.

profile.title: Profile
profile.displayNameHint: This name is shown publicly on the leaderboard and your profile.
profile.bioPlaceholder: Tell the community a bit about yourself...

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emailDescription: Receive emails for course updates and achievements.
notifications.streakReminderDescription: Get reminded to maintain your daily learning streak.
notifications.newCourseDescription: Be notified when new courses are published.

login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Connect your Solana wallet to access Superteam Academy.
login.terms: By signing in, you agree to our {terms} and {privacy}.

connectWallet.title: Connect Wallet
connectWallet.description: Select your preferred Solana wallet to connect to Superteam Academy.
connectWallet.approveRequest: Approve the connection request in your wallet.
connectWallet.failed: Failed to connect. Please try again.

linkWallet.title: Link Wallet
linkWallet.description: Link an additional wallet to your account to merge your XP history.
linkWallet.signMessage: Sign the verification message in your wallet.
linkWallet.failed: Failed to link wallet. Please try again.
linkWallet.alreadyLinked: This wallet is already linked to an account.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.wallet: Wallet error. Please reconnect your wallet.

onChain.Unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action.
onChain.CourseNotActive: This course is not currently active.
onChain.LessonOutOfBounds: The requested lesson does not exist in this course.
onChain.LessonAlreadyCompleted: You have already completed this lesson.
onChain.CourseNotCompleted: You must complete all lessons before finalizing the course.
onChain.CourseAlreadyFinalized: This course has already been finalized for your enrollment.
onChain.CourseNotFinalized: This course has not been finalized yet.
onChain.PrerequisiteNotMet: You must complete the prerequisite course before enrolling.
onChain.UnenrollCooldown: Please wait before re-enrolling in this course.
onChain.EnrollmentCourseMismatch: Enrollment record does not match this course.
onChain.Overflow: A numeric overflow occurred. Please contact support.
onChain.CourseIdTooLong: Course ID exceeds the maximum allowed length.
onChain.InvalidLessonCount: The lesson count provided is invalid.
onChain.InvalidDifficulty: The difficulty value provided is invalid.
onChain.CredentialAssetMismatch: The credential asset does not match the expected course credential.
onChain.CredentialAlreadyIssued: A credential has already been issued for this course completion.
onChain.MinterNotActive: The XP minter is not currently active.
onChain.MinterAmountExceeded: The requested XP amount exceeds the minter's allowed limit.
onChain.LabelTooLong: The label provided exceeds the maximum allowed length.
onChain.AchievementNotActive: This achievement is not currently active.
onChain.AchievementSupplyExhausted: This achievement has reached its maximum supply and is no longer available.
onChain.AchievementIdTooLong: The achievement ID exceeds the maximum allowed length.
onChain.AchievementNameTooLong: The achievement name exceeds the maximum allowed length.
onChain.AchievementUriTooLong: The achievement URI exceeds the maximum allowed length.
onChain.InvalidXpReward: The XP reward value is invalid.
